indication: XALKORI is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with unresectable, recurrent, or refractory inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor (IMT) that is ALK-positive.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to crizotinib for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with unresectable, recurrent, or refractory inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor (IMT) that is ALK-positive.
raw_cancer_type: unresectable, recurrent, or refractory inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor (IMT)
